data.title: GFL Clarifies No Perquisites for Chairman in Postal Ballot Notice
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from GFL Ltd ( (IN:GFLLIMITED) ) is now available.

GFL Ltd has issued a clarification to stock exchanges regarding its earlier postal ballot notice dated February 12, 2026, which sought shareholder approval for a special resolution. The company stated that its Chairman and Managing Director, Pavan Kumar Jain, will not receive any perquisites such as medical reimbursement or leave travel concession, signaling a tightening of executive benefit provisions and providing greater transparency to investors about management compensation.

The clarification, made under SEBI’s disclosure norms, is intended to ensure shareholders have accurate information when considering the special resolution proposed via postal ballot. By explicitly ruling out these specific perquisites for its top executive, GFL appears to be aligning executive pay practices with shareholder expectations and regulatory scrutiny, which may be viewed positively by governance-focused stakeholders.

More about GFL Ltd

GFL Ltd is an India-based listed company operating under the financial services classification, with its registered office in Mumbai and its shares traded on both the BSE and National Stock Exchange under the symbol GFLLIMITED. The company is led by Chairman and Managing Director Pavan Kumar Jain and is subject to SEBI’s listing and disclosure regulations as a publicly traded entity.

Average Trading Volume: 7,852

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: 5.01B INR

data.title: Infinity Logistics Delays 2025 Results and Faces Trading Suspension After Auditor Change
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Infinity Logistics and Transport Ventures Limited ( (HK:1442) ).

Infinity Logistics and Transport Ventures Limited has warned that it will miss the 31 March 2026 deadline for publishing its audited annual results for the year ended 31 December 2025, after the late appointment of new auditor Nexia in February created additional time pressure for completing key audit procedures. The group says it is prioritising completion of the audit over issuing unaudited management accounts to avoid confusing shareholders and expects to release preliminary 2025 results on 9 April and dispatch its annual report by 30 April, with a board meeting scheduled for 9 April to approve the accounts and consider a final dividend.

As a consequence of the delay, trading in the company’s shares on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange will be suspended from 1 April 2026 and will only resume once the 2025 results are published, a move that temporarily restricts liquidity and heightens caution for investors. The board says it is not aware of any other material audit issues beyond the timing impact of the auditor change, but has urged shareholders and potential investors to exercise care in dealing in the company’s securities during the suspension period.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1442) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Infinity Logistics and Transport Ventures Limited stock, see the HK:1442 Stock Forecast page.

More about Infinity Logistics and Transport Ventures Limited

Infinity Logistics and Transport Ventures Limited is a Hong Kong-listed company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating in the logistics and transport sector through its group subsidiaries. The company provides logistics, freight and related transport services, positioning itself within regional and international supply chains for a broad base of customers.

Average Trading Volume: 42,222

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$650.2M

For a thorough assessment of 1442 stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

TransThera Sciences (Nanjing). Inc. ( (HK:2617) ) has issued an announcement.

TransThera Sciences (Nanjing), Inc. has scheduled a board meeting for 31 March 2026 to review and approve the annual results of the company and its subsidiaries for the financial year ended 31 December 2025, as well as to consider the declaration of a final dividend. The planned meeting signals an upcoming disclosure of the company’s financial performance and potential shareholder returns, which will be important for investors tracking its operational progress and governance activities.

The board’s formal notice, issued in Hong Kong on 19 March 2026, underscores adherence to regulatory requirements for timely communication of key corporate events. The announcement also reaffirms the current composition of the board, highlighting the mix of executive, non-executive and independent directors that shape TransThera’s strategic and oversight framework.

data.title: Innventure Files Shelf Registration to Streamline Stock Resales
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Innventure ( (INV) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 18, 2026, Innventure, Inc. filed a shelf registration statement on Form S-3 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission to register the resale of its common stock by certain existing stockholders. The move consolidates three earlier Form S-1 resale registrations into a single S-3 filing, aiming to simplify compliance and streamline the resale process for already issued or contractually issuable shares.

The company emphasized that the filing does not involve new equity issuance or incremental dilution, as it covers shares that are outstanding or tied to previously issued, disclosed securities. Innventure will not receive proceeds from these secondary sales except in limited cases where it elects to issue shares under an existing standby equity purchase agreement or from cash warrant exercises, underscoring that the action primarily facilitates liquidity for current stakeholders rather than raising fresh capital.

The most recent analyst rating on (INV) stock is a Hold with a $3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Innventure stock, see the INV Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on INV Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, INV is a Neutral.

Overall score is held down primarily by very weak financial performance (large losses, negative margins, and weak cash flow) and a bearish technical setup (below major moving averages with negative MACD). Positive corporate events around fundraising and debt reduction provide some offset, but valuation is difficult to support given ongoing losses.

To see Spark’s full report on INV stock, click here.

More about Innventure

Innventure, Inc. operates as a publicly traded company focused on developing and scaling innovative ventures, using capital markets access to support growth and provide liquidity options for existing investors. Its shareholder base includes holders of previously issued common stock and convertible or exercisable securities governed by established contractual arrangements.

Elixirr International plc disclosed that non-executive director Simon Retter purchased 1,619 ordinary shares in the company on 18 March 2026 at 636.00 pence per share. The share purchase, conducted on the London Stock Exchange and reported under regulatory requirements for persons discharging managerial responsibilities, underlines continued insider confidence in the consultancy’s prospects. data.title: A2A Calls April 2026 Shareholders’ Meeting to Approve 2025 Results and Renew Governance
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

A2A SpA ( (IT:A2A) ) has provided an update.

A2A has convened its Ordinary Shareholders’ Meeting in Brescia for 28 April 2026, with a possible second call on 29 April, to vote on the 2025 financial statements, profit allocation and dividend, a new 2026-2028 long-term incentive plan, and an authorization for the purchase and disposal of treasury shares. Shareholders will also decide on remuneration policies, and appoint the new Board of Directors and Board of Statutory Auditors, including their chairs and compensation, with detailed rules set for participation, proxy voting and the role of the designated representative Computershare.

The meeting will determine how 2025 profits are distributed and what incentives will guide management over the next three years, which could influence A2A’s capital allocation, governance and alignment with shareholder interests. The renewal of corporate bodies and confirmation of voting procedures underscore a key governance moment for the utility, with potential implications for its strategic direction and oversight at a time when regulated energy and environmental services remain highly scrutinized by investors and regulators.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:A2A) stock is a Hold with a EUR2.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on A2A SpA stock, see the IT:A2A Stock Forecast page.

More about A2A SpA

A2A S.p.A. is an Italian multi-utility group active in energy, environment and networks, providing electricity, gas, district heating and waste management services. The company focuses on integrated utility services for households, businesses and public administrations, with a strong presence in key Italian urban and industrial areas.

Average Trading Volume: 11,304,598

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: €7.51B

For an in-depth examination of A2A stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

An announcement from Chrysalis Investments Limited ( (GB:CHRY) ) is now available.

Chrysalis Investments Limited has repurchased 250,000 of its ordinary shares at a weighted average price of £0.872 under its ongoing share buyback programme, with all acquired shares to be held in treasury. Following this transaction, the company holds 111,326,609 shares in treasury and has 483,823,805 ordinary shares in issue excluding treasury stock, a figure that will serve as the new reference point for shareholders assessing disclosure thresholds under UK transparency rules.

The latest buyback continues Chrysalis’s capital management strategy aimed at adjusting its share capital structure while potentially enhancing net asset value per share for remaining investors. The updated share count and treasury position also provide greater clarity for stakeholders on voting rights and regulatory notification requirements, underscoring the company’s active approach to managing its listed equity base.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:CHRY) stock is a Buy with a £96.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Chrysalis Investments Limited stock, see the GB:CHRY Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CHRY is a Neutral.

The score is mainly held back by uneven financial quality—especially negative operating/free cash flow in 2025 and high historical volatility—despite a strong recent profitability rebound and a low-leverage balance sheet. Technicals are supportive with positive momentum, and the low P/E improves the valuation picture.

data.title: CRH Advances $300m Buyback With Latest U.S. Share Repurchase
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

CRH plc ( (CRH) ) has provided an update.

CRH plc has repurchased 115,226 of its ordinary shares in the U.S. market on 18 March 2026 via broker Wells Fargo Securities at a volume-weighted average price of about $103.09 per share, with all acquired shares to be cancelled. The transaction forms part of CRH’s previously announced share buyback program of up to $300 million running to 28 April 2026 and will reduce the number of shares in issue to 668,948,579, while treasury shares will stand at 35,643,874, or roughly 5.1% of its issued capital, marginally enhancing earnings per share and consolidating existing shareholders’ stakes.

More about CRH plc

CRH plc is a global building materials group, supplying aggregates, cement, ready-mixed concrete, asphalt and related construction products and services. The company serves infrastructure, commercial and residential markets, with a strong presence in Europe and North America, and is listed in New York, where its shares are actively traded.

data.title: Spheria Emerging Companies Posts Updated Pre-Tax NTA of $2.334 Per Share
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Spheria Emerging Cos. Ltd. ( (AU:SEC) ) has provided an update.

Spheria Emerging Companies Limited reported an estimated pre-tax net tangible asset backing of $2.334 per share as at 18 March 2026, reflecting the daily valuation of its investment portfolio and cash. The figure is presented after accounting for a 1.3 cent per share dividend that went ex-dividend on 16 March 2026 and is payable on 31 March 2026, and is described as unaudited and approximate, giving investors a timely but indicative view of the company’s underlying asset value.

The NTA calculation incorporates tax on realised gains and other earnings while excluding tax on unrealised gains and certain deferred tax assets, which may cause the reported measure to differ from a full balance-sheet view of net asset value. This update helps shareholders assess current portfolio performance and capital management settings, though the company emphasises that the estimate may be refined when audited or more comprehensive figures are released.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:SEC) stock is a Buy with a A$2.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Spheria Emerging Cos. Ltd. stock, see the AU:SEC Stock Forecast page.

More about Spheria Emerging Cos. Ltd.

Spheria Emerging Companies Limited is an ASX-listed investment company focused on emerging companies, holding a portfolio of smaller-cap equities and cash. The company’s net tangible asset position is driven by the daily valuation of its investment portfolio, adjusted for management and performance fees, operating costs and applicable taxes.
